title: You Fund Drug Research, Then Pay Four Times More
description: Americans pay 4x more than other wealthy nations for brand-name drugs — not because of innovation costs, but because of a legally protected system of patent manipulation, opaque middlemen, and prohibited government negotiation. This piece follows the money through the full pricing architecture: from NIH-funded discovery to PBM rebate games to the lobbying that keeps the whole structure intact.
heroImageAlt: Editorial illustration for You Fund Drug Research, Then Pay Four Times More
